text:
·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol.42 — 39 PRs merged. New models, MCP overhaul, and stopping orphan processes from screaming into the void.

───

→ THE GREAT MODEL MIGRATION
Added DeepSeek V4 via DeepInfra, Claude Opus 4.7 via Bedrock, and Qwen3-TTS. For images, we replaced boolean reasoning with fast/balanced/pro modes. Also added a seed parameter to audio for deterministic caching.

→ MCP v2.1.0 & ARCHITECTURE
Massive MCP overhaul with a dynamic registry and single-gateway cleanup. Also fixed a bug where Windows orphan processes would busy-loop endlessly when the parent exited. They can rest now.

→ PLATFORM & DASHBOARD
Generation is now gated on login. We added usage period pickers and better dashboard buckets. Also fixed a highly specific issue where we were auto-banning users just because they deleted their GitHub accounts. Oops.

→ COMMUNITY GREENHOUSE
11 new community apps added to the ecosystem, spanning chat, writing, image, and business tools. Also gave the mobile UI some much-needed layout polish.

Everything is open source. Come build something weird: pollinations.ai

#OpenSource #AI #DevTools #WebDev
